mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.class_name as className, c.class_code as classCode, c.teacher_name as teacherName, c.description, c.student_count as studentCount, c.learning_progress as learningProgress, c.average_score as averageScore, c.status, c.create_time as createTime FROM class_info c WHERE c.deleted = 0
AND (c.class_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.teacher_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND c.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT c.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM class_student cs WHERE cs.class_id = c.id AND cs.deleted = 0) as actual_student_count FROM class_info c WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.deleted = 0
